coachAM: Your journal entries reveal a consistent pattern of morning gratitude and aspirational intent, yet your lowest habit completion rates in Sleep Protocol and Training expose a critical disconnect: your *desire* for discipline and efficiency isn't translating into the foundational *physical execution* required to sustain it. The root cause is a catastrophic failure in self-management and boundary setting, evidenced by the "Instagram, games, loop scrolling" admission and lack of evening reflection, which directly undermines the physiological and mental capacity needed for elite performance and will inevitably collapse your long-term trajectory. Today, before *any* other input, send a calendar invite to yourself for 9:00 PM tonight, labeled "Sleep Protocol Commencement," and honor it.
